title: Greeley Daily Tribune — September 25, 1934 (Page 5)
author: Greeley Daily Tribune
card_summary: A clipped page from the Greeley Daily Tribune (Greeley, Colorado), dated Tuesday, September 25, 1934, page 5. Philip K. Dick was approximately six years old in 1934; this clipping is likely related to early Dick family history or their connection to the Greeley, Colorado area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Greeley Daily Tribune (Greeley, Colorado), dated Tuesday, September 25, 1934, page 5. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com, clipped by researcher pwshelton8296 on April 9, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

Philip K. Dick was approximately five years old in September 1934. By this time, his parents had divorced and his mother Dorothy had moved with him to California. This Greeley clipping likely documents Dick family history or connections to the Colorado community. The systematic collection of newspaper clippings from both Greeley (Dick's early family roots) and San Rafael (his adult residence) reflects a thorough biographical research methodology.
